entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop cultivated in Sri Lanka, evaluated for its nutritional and fiber composition.

entities.name: RAVI
entities.description: A specific variety of finger millet evaluated in the study.

entities.name: RAWANA
entities.description: A specific variety of finger millet evaluated in the study.

entities.name: OSHADHA
entities.description: A specific variety of finger millet evaluated in the study.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A commonly consumed cereal used as a comparison for nutritional content.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A commonly consumed cereal used as a comparison for nutritional content.

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: The country where the finger millet varieties were cultivated.

entities.name: TOTAL DIETARY FIBER
entities.description: The combined content of soluble and insoluble dietary fibers.

entities.name: SOLUBLE DIETARY FIBER
entities.description: A fraction of dietary fiber that dissolves in water.

entities.name: INSOLUBLE DIETARY FIBER
entities.description: A fraction of dietary fiber that does not dissolve in water.

entities.name: RAPIDLY DIGESTIBLE STARCH
entities.description: A fraction of starch that is quickly broken down during digestion.

entities.name: SLOWLY DIGESTIBLE STARCH
entities.description: A fraction of starch that is digested more slowly than rapidly digestible starch.

entities.name: RESISTANT STARCH
entities.description: A fraction of starch that resists digestion in the small intestine.

entities.name: ARABINOXYLANS
entities.description: A type of hemicellulose found in the grain.

entities.name: BETA-GLUCANS
entities.description: A type of soluble fiber found in the grain.

entities.name: FRUCTANS
entities.description: A type of soluble fiber found in the grain.

entities.name: AMYLOSE
entities.description: A linear polymer of glucose found in starch.

entities.name: TOTAL SUGAR
entities.description: The total amount of sugars present in the grain.

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Inorganic elements present in the grain.

entities.name: TRACE ELEMENTS
entities.description: Minerals required by the body in very small quantities.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein content of the finger millet varieties.

entities.name: CRUDE FAT
entities.description: The total lipid content of the finger millet varieties.

entities.name: CRUDE FIBER
entities.description: The indigestible residue remaining after chemical processing.

entities.name: ASH CONTENT
entities.description: The inorganic residue remaining after the combustion of organic matter.

entities.name: SODIUM
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: PHOSPHOROUS
entities.description: A mineral element found in finger millet.

entities.name: STANDARD PROTOCOLS
entities.description: The set of standardized procedures used to evaluate nutritional composition.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The overall profile of nutrients, fibers, and minerals in the crop.

entities.name: PROXIMATE COMPOSITION
entities.description: The analysis of the main components such as protein, fat, and fiber.
